info.name: ParseFlow API
info.description:
ParseFlow is a document parsing API that extracts structured JSON from invoices, receipts, and PDFs in a single API call.

**Base URL:** `https://api-ebon-tau-30.vercel.app`

**Authentication:** Set `X-API-Key` header to your API key (obtained free from `/v1/register`).

**Quick Start:**
1. Call `POST /v1/register` with your company name — get an API key instantly (no email required)
2. Call `POST /v1/parse` with your document file
3. Receive structured JSON with vendor, amounts, dates, line items

**Free tier:** 50 parses/month, no credit card required.

**Links:**
- Dashboard: https://parseflow-dashboard.vercel.app
- Docs: https://parseflow-dashboard.vercel.app/docs
- Status: https://parseflow-dashboard.vercel.app/status
- GitHub: https://github.com/NikitaDmitrieff/parseflow

variable.description: Your ParseFlow API key — get one free from POST /v1/register

request.description: Check API health. Returns current status, version, and timestamp. No authentication required.

Register a new organization and receive an API key instantly. No email or credit card required.

The returned `api_key` will not be shown again — save it securely.

**Free tier:** 50 parses/month included.

response.name: 201 Created
response.body:
{
  "organization_id": "uuid-here",
  "api_key": "pf_live_abc123...",
  "plan": "free",
  "parses_quota": 50,
  "warning": "Save this key — it will not be shown again."
}

formdata.description: PDF, JPEG, PNG, or WebP file — max 10MB
Set to 'true' to include raw extracted text in response

request.description:
Parse a document and receive structured JSON.

**Supported formats:** PDF, JPEG, PNG, WebP (max 10MB)

**Extracted fields:**
- `vendor` — seller/supplier name
- `vendor_address` — seller address
- `invoice_number` — invoice/receipt identifier
- `date` — document date (ISO 8601)
- `due_date` — payment due date
- `total` — total amount due
- `subtotal` — pre-tax amount
- `tax` — tax amount
- `currency` — 3-letter ISO currency code
- `line_items[]` — array of line items with description, quantity, unit_price, amount
- `confidence` — extraction confidence score (0–1)
- `processing_ms` — server-side processing time in milliseconds
- `document_type` — detected document type (invoice, receipt, other)

Requires `X-API-Key` authentication header.

response.name: 200 OK — Invoice parsed
response.body:
{
  "id": "uuid-here",
  "status": "success",
  "document_type": "invoice",
  "vendor": "Acme Solutions Ltd",
  "vendor_address": "123 Business Ave, San Francisco, CA 94102",
  "invoice_number": "INV-2026-00142",
  "date": "2026-02-28",
  "due_date": "2026-03-30",
  "total": 4750.00,
  "subtotal": 4375.00,
  "tax": 375.00,
  "currency": "USD",
  "line_items": [
    {
      "description": "Software Development Services",
      "quantity": 35,
      "unit_price": 125.00,
      "amount": 4375.00
    }
  ],
  "confidence": 0.94,
  "processing_ms": 847,
  "model_used": "claude-3-5-sonnet-20241022"
}

formdata.description: Returns raw_text field with OCR output

request.description: Parse a receipt image with raw text included in the response. Useful for debugging or when you need the raw OCR output alongside the structured data.

Check your current month's usage, quota, and remaining parses.

Returns:
- `parses_used` — documents parsed this month
- `parses_quota` — monthly limit for your plan
- `parses_remaining` — parses left this month
- `plan` — current plan (free, pro, scale)
- `period_start` / `period_end` — billing period dates

Try ParseFlow without an API key. Returns a realistic sample parse result.

**Scenarios:**
- `invoice` (default) — sample B2B invoice with line items
- `receipt` — sample SaaS subscription receipt

Responses include `_demo: true` to distinguish from real parses.

response.body:
{
  "id": "uuid-here",
  "status": "success",

  "total": 4750.00,
  "subtotal": 4375.00,
  "tax": 375.00,
  "currency": "USD",
  "line_items": [
    {
      "description": "Software Development Services",
      "quantity": 35,
      "unit_price": 125.00,
      "amount": 4375.00
    }
  ],
  "confidence": 0.94,
  "processing_ms": 7,
  "model_used": "rule-based-v1",
  "_demo": true,
  "_note": "This is a demo response. Register at /v1/register for a real API key."
}

request.description: Demo endpoint — receipt scenario. Returns a sample SaaS subscription receipt.
POST version of the demo endpoint. Pass `scenario` in the JSON body.

Create a checkout session to upgrade your plan. Returns a `checkout_url` to redirect the user to Stripe or Lemon Squeezy.

**Plans:**
- `pro` — $9/month, 1,000 parses/month
- `scale` — $29/month, 10,000 parses/month

Requires `X-API-Key` authentication.
Upgrade to the Scale plan — $29/month for 10,000 parses.
